name: awesome-deep-researchers
description: Codex skills and benchmark guidance for evaluating deep research agents and normalizing their outputs.

interface.shortDescription: Run and evaluate deep research agents.
interface.longDescription: Skills and benchmark guidance for calling third-party deep research APIs, comparing under-$1 research tasks, and normalizing outputs to Open Knowledge Format bundles.
defaultPrompt: Run an under-$1 deep research benchmark.
Normalize this research report to OKF.
Compare deep research API call patterns.
